titleStmt.title: SII 5.440: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 440. (A.R. No. 149 of 1894). ON THE INSIDE OF THE WEST WALL OF THE THIRD PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
pūmalar tiruvum puricaiyuRead porujaya.maṭantaiyum tāmaraik kuvimulai ceya
p potRead puyat.tiruppa vetAviRead vetanāvil.veḷḷitaḷ tāmaraikkātalmātu(la)kaviṉ
peṟuRead peṟat.taLaippaRead tiḷaippa.veN Tirai UTutta maNTiṉi kiTakkai tirunila maTantai yirimaiyilRead urimaiyil.ka
ḷippa camaiyamum nitiyum tarumamum taḷaippa Imaiyavar viḻākkoṭi Iṭantoṟu
m Eṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉakeṭalRead kaṉal keṭa.kaṭavuḷ vetiya raruntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkolRead ceṅkaṉal.
vaḷarppac curutiyum tamiḻum tolvaḷaṅ kulavap porutiṟalāḻi pūtalam cūḻvara Oru(va)
kai Irucevi mummatam nāḷkoṭṭayirāmatamRead ṭayirāvatam.mutal ceyiṟ tirikoṟṟat teṇṭicai
āṉai Erutta meṟi kaṇṭanāṭu E(m)mateṉa kayal kaḷikūra pokalamRead pocalam.tuLuvam kokiramRead kocalam.kucciram p
otalam makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaram(ṅ) kaliṅkam IḻamRead īḻam.kaṭāram kevuṭam teliṅkam coṉakam
ciṉa mutalā vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyil muṭiyuṭaṉ ventaṟku E
(e)ḻuntaruḷiya nāyakaṇeṉṟuRead ṉeṉṟu.ulaku Etta tirumuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol Occik koṟṟattoḷ kuḷirkuṭai ni
ḻaṟa kaṟṟai kavari kāvalar vica viṭai katir navamaṇi virasi ṅkātaṉat tuṭaṉ muṭi cūṭiRead uyar.uyirkulat tiruvuḷam paṅ
kayamalaṟ karaṅ kuvittup pārttivar varamaṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkum ceṉṉi cuṭaroḷi mavulic cuṭarma
ṇimicaiyiṭaviṭac civanta Iṇaimalar ciṟaṭik kamalam matukaram kamalam Eṉṟu Aṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyā
ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya mā(ta)mutal maṇikkulam viḷakkiya komutal komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakka
ravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 vatu nāḷ toḷāyiratteṇpattu Eṭṭiṉāl māṭa
k kuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyil paḷḷiaṟaikkūṭattu paḷḷippiṭam maḻavarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷiiruntu
kiḻveṇpunāṭṭu tirunelveliyuṭaiyār koyilil patipātamu(ta)lap paṭṭuṭai pañcāc
āriyaṉ tevakaṉmiyum civappirāmaṇaruñ ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi vaṭatalaic cem
pināṭṭu kiḻaikkoṭumaḷurrāṉa maturotaiyanallūr Araiyaṉ pūvaṉāṉa veṇāvuṭai
yār tirunelveli melaikkāṉakaraiyil Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Āvuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṟku ti
ruppaṭimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nimantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷināṭṭuc ceravaṉmāteviccatu
rvve timaṅkalattuk kiḻpiṭākai kaliceyamaṅkalattil Aṅkavayicciyaril paracirāmaṉukkuc
civitamāṉa pāṭakappaṭi nilam veliyum nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam mākāṇiyum toṭṭanilam Iraṇṭu māvum
maṉaiyum muṉṉuṭaiyārum mutalum Uḻavum ci(v)vitamum tavirntu kārāṇmai miyāṭciyum kaṭa
maiyum Antarāyamum viṉiyokamum Uḻutāṉkuṭi pāṭikāvalum taruvatāṉa Accum kāriyavaārāṭcci
yum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcipilRead pañcupili.cantuvikkiramRead cantivikkiraka.ppeṟum poṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭ
ṭiṉavum Uṭpaṭa Eṭṭāvati(ṉ) ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟai yiliyā
ka Iṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟu Ayyaṉ maḻavarāyar namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Āvuṭaiyapiḷḷaiyāṟku
tiruppatimāṟṟu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nimantaṅkaḷukku muḷḷināṭṭuc ceravaṉmāteviccaturvve timaṅ
kalattil kiḻpiṭākai kaliceyamaṅkalattu Aṅkavayicciyaril paracirāmaṟku civitamāṉa pāṭakappaṭi nilam veliyu
m nāṟṟaṅkāl nilam mākāṇiyum toṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum maṉaiyum muṉṉu ṭaiyārum mutalumBelow this, a line is built in.
ṉvariyum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭppaṭa Ivvāṇṭu mutal t
evatāṉa Iṟaiyiliāka Iṭṭu nam puravariyār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum nam Ōlaiyu
m taraccoṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrāditya vaṟ celvatāka kallilum cempi
lum veṭṭivittukkoḷvatākat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār . Ivai tirumallināṭṭut taṭa
ṅkaṇ ciṟṟūruṭaiyā ṉuyyaniṉṟāṭuvāṉ viracoḻatevaṉāṉa kurukulattaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭu cakkarapāṇinallūr Araiyaṉ viratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarāya
ṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.440 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
